message:
fix(tui): board lane select_last used .first(), fix search delta comparison

select_last_in_non_empty_board_lane() called indices.first() instead
of indices.last(), selecting the first item in the last non-empty lane
instead of the last item.  The function is used when pressing '$' (end)
in Board mode.

Also fix move_board_search_match_relative() to use `delta > 0` instead
of `delta >= 0`, matching the equivalent main search function.  The
delta == 0 case is already handled by the early return, so this is a
consistency fix rather than a behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
